maintext: Ozzie Osband, known as Cheshire Catalyst, was a phreaker and hacker active in the early days of the hacking scene. He was the editor of the Technology Assistance Program (TAP) newsletter, a successor to the YIPL (Youth International Party Line) newsletter that was a key publication in the phone phreaking community. He was known for originating the 321 telephone area code and was sometimes referred to as the Rocket Hobo.
